First Steps
Bonus: Operation Quick Start
Find your market

Find your market

Find your market
• Photography > making money from your
photography
• Tennis > strength building of tennis players
• Travel > international travel with small kids
Find your market
• Finding your place…
• What are your interests? Hobbies? Passions?
• What do people come to you for help?
Find your people
• Understanding your avatar is critical
• You are probably NOT your market
• Sell them what they want - give them what they
need

Find your people – where are they
gathering?
• Social (different groups can gather in different
places)
• Facebook groups
• Facebook thought leaders
• Facebook ads
• YouTube
• Twitter hashtags
• Instagram
Find your people – where are they
gathering?
• Blogs…
• Search on Google for the main keywords
• e.g. guitar – go to google and type “learn
guitar”
• “learn guitar blogs
• “learn guitar forums
Find your people – where are they
gathering?
• Go to Amazon and search for books on your
topic
• Look at top books
• Read the reviews
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
Find your people – where are they
gathering?
• Go to the forums
• Type in the key phrase “learn guitar forums”
• Find forums your people are hanging out in
• Look at the most popular threads
Get to know your people
• Go to the blogs that serve whatever market
you’re in
• Read all the posts (which ones have the most
comments)
• Read all the comments
• Read through reviews
• Read through threads on Facebook
• Spend time where they hang out
Get to know your people
• Watch the language they use
• Watch the phrases they use
• Focus on what they care about
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 9 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	5
Get to know your people
• Find the products they’re buying
• Study the marketing
• What does the copy tell you about
objections?
• Hot points?
• Buy the products
Get to know your people
• Brainstorm
• Top 3 things that keep them up at night
• Top 3 objections
• Top 3 dangers
• Top 3 opportunities / aspirations
• Top 3 strengths or secrets they don’t know
about
Start building your presence
• Participate and add value wherever they’re
hanging out
• You can start this right away
• But be mindful of group norms
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 9 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	6
Start building your email list
• No one starts with a list
• It’s the ultimate power (and the one true asset)
• Social is a tool for building your email list
Start building your email list
• Create a lead magnet
• Video or PDF (or both) works great
• Look at your “top 3” lists
• Look at sticky / popular topics in forums
• Done is better than perfect, you can iterate
• Your lead magnet is an asset (sixinseven.com)
Start building your email list
• Create a squeeze page
• Hook up your email list service
• Create your sequence - get the first three
messages done:
• Welcome + lead magnet delivery + what will it
do for them
• Lead magnet consumption (reason why) +
intro/authority
• Back story + lesson + lead magnet consumption
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 9 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	7
Start building your email list
• Send traffic to squeeze page
• From social / forums / presence
• Paid traffic
• SOON: create a weekly flagship content strategy
Always be thinking about your offer
• You should start building your list immediately,
even if you don’t have an offer
• But you should be thinking about creating an
offer ASAP
Always be thinking about your offer
• Continue to get to know your people
• All the research you’ve already done - plus:
• What subject lines do they open?
• What emails do they react to?
• What videos / blog posts do they react to?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	8
Always be thinking about your offer
• Consider FB Live and other ways to get in front of
them live
• Answer questions they send via email - get in
conversations
• Always look for ways to interact and have
conversations
Always be thinking about your offer
• Ask them…
• What they’re excited about
• What they’re worried about
• What they want to accomplish in the next three
months
• What’s holding them back
• Their biggest fears
Your next big step is the Seed Launch
• It’s the easiest way to create your first product
• It’s beyond the scope of this course - but it’s
covered in PLF
• And we go deeper in the Seed Launch Deep Dive
Program (SLDD)

An aside… a book is not a business
• You worked hard on your book
• But the world doesn’t care
• No one makes money from a book
An aside… a book is not a business
• No one makes money from a book
• It’s cool if you don’t want money - if you just
want your message out there
• But if you want money, you need a course or
some type of offer to bring people into from
the book
Next after a Seed Launch…
• Keep building your list
• Build out your full product based on what you
learned in your Seed Launch
